title: horminum foliosum
intro: Horminum foliosum, also known as Mountain Mint or American Mountain Mint, is a perennial plant native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's essential oils and extracts have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Horminum foliosum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in herbal remedies and traditional medicine.
